description: RQ5-B assertion chain AST metadata codebook and coverage limits (Milestone 3).

field_notes.assertion_framework_context: Test framework from extraction context (Playwright, Cypress, etc.).
field_notes.assertion_library_syntax: Assertion library/syntax family inferred from AST (may differ from test framework).
field_notes.assertion_framework: Legacy alias for assertion_library_syntax in event CSVs.
field_notes.assertion_callback_intent_hint_ast: Primary verification-intent hint inferred from nested assertion matcher/property/literal-argument AST nodes inside Cypress should(callback)/and(callback).
field_notes.assertion_callback_intent_basis_ast: AST evidence basis for callback intent hints; currently ast_callback_nested_assertion.
field_notes.assertion_callback_nested_matchers_json: Nested semantic matcher names collected from callback assertion AST nodes.
field_notes.assertion_callback_subject_properties_js: Subject property/callee segments collected from callback assertion AST nodes.
field_notes.chain_matcher_sequence_json: Ordered matcher sequence for all semantic assertion matchers in an assertion chain.
field_notes.non_assertion_chain_methods_json: Ordered non-assertion call methods in the same chain, such as Cypress get/find/eq query methods.
field_notes.chain_group_rows_json: Review-bundle-only packet showing all sibling matcher rows that share a sampled assertion_chain_root_id.

partial_coverage_note: Assertion-chain metrics are AST-tagged chain metrics among assertions with chain metadata. Always report assertions_with_chain_fields and assertions_missing_chain_metadata_count alongside chained/standalone fractions. Residual AST gaps: Chai property chains (.to.equal, .to.be.visible), Nightwatch browser.assert wrappers, WebDriverIO element matchers, exotic grouped contexts, and assertions inside unsupported callback wrappers.
